entity.label: Moza
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Zimri, of the posterity of Saul (1 Chr. 8:36, 37; 9:42, 43).

nodes.label: Moza
nodes.description: The son of Zimri, of the posterity of Saul (1 Chr. 8:36, 37; 9:42, 43).

verses.text: And Ahaz begat Jehoadah; and Jehoadah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza,
And Moza begat Binea: Rapha was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son:
And Ahaz begat Jarah; and Jarah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza;
And Moza begat Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
